query:
_index=sumologic_audit_events (_sourceCategory=serviceAllowlist OR _sourceCategory=passwordPolicy OR _sourceCategory=multiFactorAuthentication)
| json "operator.sourceIp" as AdminIp nodrop
| lookup latitude, longitude, country_code, country_name, region, city, postal_code from geo://location on ip = AdminIp
|where if ("{{AdminIp}}" = "*", true, AdminIp matches "{{AdminIp}}")
|count by latitude, longitude, country_code, country_name, region, city, postal_code
| sort _count

sources.dashboardName: Enterprise Audit - Password Policy, MFA, Service AllowList Activities
sources.dashboardDescription: Password Policy, MFA, Service AllowList Activities Dashboard provides detailed information about password policy creation, deletion, and updates. It also provides a high-level view of users that enable and disable multi factor authorization (MFA), service allowlist updates, as well as user and admin activities.
